answer:
Yes, QuickBooks provides a free tier for developer API access through the Builder tier of the Intuit App Partner Program [1][2]. This tier is uncharged and automatically assigned to all apps [1][2].

Key details of the Builder tier:
- It includes 500,000 monthly CorePlus API credits [3][2].
- Core API calls are unmetered and free for all tiers [4][2].
- If you exceed the 500,000 limit, additional CorePlus calls are blocked until the next month [3][2][5].
- Premium APIs are not accessible in the Builder tier; these require upgrading to Silver, Gold, or Platinum tiers [6][7].
